news.title: TSMC exits Arm investment with $231 million sale
news.description: TSMC has fully divested its stake in Arm Holdings, selling approximately 1.11 million shares at US$207.65 each for a total of US$231 million, the company disclosed on April 29, 2026. The transaction generated roughly US$174 million in retained earnings.
